{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = White Fox constructs
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Some of [[Lindon's mother]]'s [[White Fox constructs]] can craft images from illusions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
